  • Uses of Trick in com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine

    Method parameters in com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine with type arguments of type Trick
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    GameEngine.findGameWinner(List<Trick> tricks)
    Finds the player who won the most game points from captured cards.
    static String
    GameEngine.findHighTrump(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
    Finds the player who was dealt the highest trump card.
    static String
    GameEngine.findJackWinner(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
    Finds the player who captured the Jack of trumps.
    static String
    GameEngine.findLowTrump(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
    Finds the player who was dealt the lowest trump card.

    Methods in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model that return Trick
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Trick
    Game.getCurrentTrick()
    Returns the current trick being played, or null if between tricks.
    Trick
    Game.playCard(Card card)
    Plays a card for the current player.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Trick>
    Game.getTricks()
    Returns all completed tricks in the order they were played.
